decks.notes: This deck utilizes aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelai, Exuberant Shepherd, combined with disruptive spells like Solitude and Quantum Riddler to control the game and pressure the opponent. The focus is on disrupting the opponent's game plan while quickly building a board presence to overwhelm them. The deck also includes cards like Consign to Memory and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker for additional utility and card advantage. By combining aggression and disruption, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver opponents in a Modern 1 vs 1 format.

This UW Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy while maintaining card advantage and board control through a variety of spells such as Counterspell, Prismatic Ending, and Wrath of the Skies. The deck includes cards like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Teferi, Time Raveler for additional control options and card advantage. The deck also includes Isochron Scepter for repeatable spellcasting and Meticulous Archive for card selection. The companion Kaheera, the Orphanguard provides additional synergy and benefits with the deck's creature cards.

The main focus of this Dimir Control deck is to disrupt your opponent's strategy by using a combination of hand disruption cards like Thoughtseize and Inquisition of Kozilek, along with removal spells like Fatal Push and Force of Despair. The deck also utilizes graveyard interactions with cards like Necrodominance and Cling to Dust to gain an advantage. Additionally, the deck has ways to gain life and stabilize with cards like Soul Spike and Graveyard Trespasser. The deck aims to control the game and outvalue the opponent with its resource management and disruption.

This deck focuses on ramping up mana to quickly cast powerful Eldrazi creatures and control the game by using disruptive spells like Trinisphere and Kozilek's Return. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with massive threats like Emrakul, the Promised End and Karn, the Great Creator, while also having access to cards like Malevolent Rumble and Sowing Mycospawn for additional control. The deck includes mana acceleration cards like Utopia Sprawl and Eldrazi Temple to quickly cast high-cost spells, creating a challenging board state for the opponent to deal with.

The deck focuses on assembling the Broodscale Bloodchief combo using cards like Basking Broodscale, Malevolent Rumble, and Glaring Fleshraker to create a powerful synergy. By utilizing cards such as Urza's Saga and Eldrazi Temple to ramp into Emrakul, the Promised End and Walking Ballista, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with huge threats and generate value through sacrifice effects and token generation. The combination of card draw, removal, and creatures with synergy creates a versatile and resilient strategy.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana using Birthing Ritual and then overwhelming the opponent with a combination of efficient creatures like Ice-Fang Coatl and Shardless Agent, disruption spells like Flare of Denial and Force of Negation, and card advantage engines like Coiling Oracle. The goal is to establish early board presence and control the game tempo, while also having the flexibility to answer threats with cards like Subtlety and Endurance. By efficiently utilizing resources and maintaining pressure, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent for a decisive victory.

The key concept of this deck is to aggressively deal damage to the opponent using a combination of cheap and efficient creatures, burn spells, and pump spells. It aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with early aggression while maintaining card advantage through cantrips like Preordain and Mishra's Bauble. By utilizing cards like Monastery Swiftspear, Lightning Bolt, and Mutagenic Growth, the deck aims to apply pressure and close out the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize. The mana base allows for flexible color requirements and consistent access to the necessary spells.

The main idea of this deck is to efficiently control the game by assembling the UrzaTron lands (Urza's Mine, Urza's Tower, and Urza's Power Plant) to generate a large amount of mana. This mana is used to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Kozilek, Butcher of Truth, as well as threats like Karn, the Great Creator. The deck also includes disruption elements like Disruptor Flute and Chalice of the Void to control the opponent's game plan, making it difficult for them to execute their strategy effectively.

This deck focuses on using a variety of creatures with synergistic abilities to create powerful combinations that can disrupt the opponent's strategy. It utilizes cards like Young Wolf and Strangleroot Geist to generate value and board presence, while also utilizing Yawgmoth, Thran Physician to control the board and draw cards. The toolbox aspect of the deck allows for flexibility in finding the right creature for the situation, with Green Sun's Zenith acting as a versatile tutor. The deck's resilience and efficiency make it a strong contender in the Modern format.

Control the game by ramping up mana using the UrzaTron lands and Eldrazi Temple, while disrupting your opponent's strategy with hand disruption from Thought-Knot Seer and removal spells like Dismember. Use powerful planeswalkers like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms to control the battlefield and win with powerful finishers like Ulamog, the Ceaseless Hunger. The deck also has a combo with Devourer of Destiny and Glaring Fleshraker to lock down the opponent's board. The key strategy is to efficiently control the game and overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats.

This deck aims to disrupt and control the opponent's game plan by using a toolbox of counter spells, hand disruption, and removal spells. The deck also utilizes card draw and filtering to ensure consistency in drawing the necessary answers. The win condition is to out-value the opponent with efficient threats and lock down the game with disruptive spells. The deck focuses on manipulating the opponent's resources and controlling the tempo of the game until it can secure a victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and disruptive spells to control the opponent's board while dealing consistent damage. It combines powerful cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phage, Titan of Fire's Fury with removal spells like Prismatic Ending and Solitude to keep the opponent's threats in check. Teferi, Time Raveler provides additional disruption while Quantum Riddler and Consign to Memory offer card advantage and flexibility. The deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early on and maintain control throughout the game to secure a victory.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using cards like Arboreal Grazer and Amulet of Vigor, while utilizing lands like Gruul Turf and Simic Growth Chamber to generate additional mana. The ultimate goal is to cast Primeval Titan and search for lands like Urza's Saga and Boseiju, Who Endures to further strengthen the deck. Once a critical mass of lands is on the battlefield, cards like Scapeshift and Green Sun's Zenith can be used to either search for key combo pieces or deal massive damage to the opponent in a single turn.

The main concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. The deck aims to put pressure on the opponent from the beginning of the game by playing efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride, while also using cards like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to clear the way or finish off the opponent. The inclusion of powerful planeswalkers like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and strong enchantments like Arena of Glory provide additional sources of damage and versatility to the deck's game plan.

This deck focuses on playing low-cost artifacts and creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a flurry of attacks. By utilizing cards like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble to ramp up mana and draw cards, the deck can efficiently deploy threats like Memnite and Pinnacle Emissary early in the game. Urza's Saga provides additional value by tutoring for key artifacts, while Metallic Rebuke and Engineered Explosives help control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. With a mix of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure a swift victory.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo pieces involving Basking Broodscale and Glaring Fleshraker, which can generate a large amount of mana and allow for explosive plays. The deck also utilizes Eldrazi Temple and Boseiju, Who Endures to further ramp and protect key cards, while leveraging cards like Blade of the Bloodchief and Kozilek's Command to control the board and disrupt opponents. Additionally, the deck includes powerful threats like Emrakul, the Promised End and Devourer of Destiny to close out games quickly.
